summary: Completed testing of Notes API, Notes UI, Spot Database expansion, and Crew Chat quick actions. All features working correctly. Fixed critical bug: Notes API routes had double /api prefix (/api/api/notes) - corrected to /api/notes.

fixed.issue: Routes had double /api prefix (/api/api/notes) - fixed by changing router prefix from '/api/notes' to '/notes'

context_for_next_testing_agent: Notes feature fully functional. Spot database has 1,322 spots including Tahiti (15), Maldives (17), Morocco (26), South Africa (29). Crew Chat has 20 quick actions in 4 categories.

notes_api.POST /api/notes/create: PASS - Creates note with 24hr expiration, max 60 chars, replaces existing note
notes_api.GET /api/notes/feed: PASS - Returns own note + followed users' notes
notes_api.GET /api/notes/my-note: PASS - Returns user's active note or null

notes_ui.Your note bubble: PASS - Visible in Messages page, shows time remaining
notes_ui.Create Note modal: PASS - Input field (max 60 chars), character count, Cancel/Share buttons
notes_ui.Note sharing: PASS - Success toast shown, note appears with time remaining

crew_chat.quick_actions: PASS - 20 actions in 4 categories (status, conditions, logistics, vibes)
